primary_concern: Sepsis with acute kidney injury (AKI) and coagulopathy
clinical_summary: Elevated lactate (4.2 mmol/L) combined with leukocytosis (WBC 14.2 K/uL) and hemoglobin 9.8 g/dL meet Sepsis-3 criteria for sepsis risk. Progressive AKI is evident with creatinine rising from baseline to stage 3 (8.9 mg/dL, though flagged as outlier). Platelets have declined to 88 K/uL, meeting SOFA coagulopathy criteria. Bilirubin elevation (1.4 mg/dL) suggests possible hepatic involvement.

prioritized_risks.explanation: Lactate >2 mmol/L, WBC >12 K/uL, and elevated creatinine meet Sepsis-3 criteria (suspected infection + SOFA increase ≥2)
Creatinine elevation to 8.9 mg/dL (outlier excluded) meets KDIGO stage 3 criteria
Platelets <100 K/uL meets SOFA coagulopathy scoring threshold

recommended_actions: Initiate broad-spectrum antibiotics per local sepsis protocol
Order urgent infectious workup (blood cultures, imaging)
Start fluid resuscitation and reassess for vasopressor support
Monitor platelet trends and consider transfusion threshold evaluation
Review excluded creatinine outlier for specimen integrity
doctor_handoff: Confirm source of infection, reassess AKI stage using historical creatinine values, and evaluate for septic shock criteria if hypotension develops.

disease_progression.observation: Initial sepsis markers: WBC 14.2 K/uL, Hgb 9.8 g/dL
AKI stage 3 (Cr 8.9 mg/dL, outlier excluded), platelets 88 K/uL

excluded_outliers.reason: Rapid change detected — Creatinine changed by 6.5 mg/dL within 6.0h (max allowed: 2.0). Probable measurement error or specimen issue. Section 15.2 — rise > 2.0 mg/dL in < 6h.

family_communication.english_summary: In the last 12 hours, we've seen signs of a serious infection (sepsis) affecting multiple organs. The kidneys are struggling badly (stage 3 kidney injury), and blood clotting factors are low. We're giving strong antibiotics, searching for the infection source, and carefully managing fluids. The team is closely watching for any drop in blood pressure that might require additional support. We're also verifying a very high kidney function reading to ensure it's accurate.
family_communication.regional_summary: पिछले 12 घंटों में गंभीर संक्रमण के कारण शरीर के कई अंग प्रभावित हो रहे हैं। गुर्दे बुरी तरह काम कर रहे हैं (तीसरे चरण की गुर्दा समस्या) और रक्त के थक्का बनाने वाले घटक कम हैं। हम मजबूत एंटीबायोटिक दे रहे हैं, संक्रमण के स्रोत की तलाश कर रहे हैं और तरल पदार्थों को ध्यान से नियंत्रित कर रहे हैं। टीम रक्तचाप में गिरावट की निगरानी कर रही है जिसके लिए अतिरिक्त समर्थन की आवश्यकता हो सकती है। हम गुर्दे के कार्य के बारे में एक बहुत ऊँचे परिणाम की पुष्टि कर रहे हैं ताकि यह सुनिश्चित किया जा सके कि यह सही है।
